zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Joan Cornish於大約1452年出生在英國艾可馬申波利時，她的父親John Cornish29歲，母親Agnes23歲。她於1480年與Thomas Everard Esq.在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年在英國肯特享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Joan Cornish于大约1452年出生在英国艾可馬申波利时，她的父亲John Cornish29岁，母亲Agnes23岁。她于1480年与Thomas Everard Esq.在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年在英国肯特享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cornish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

variants.name: Corns
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Lancashire): variant of Cornish or Corn , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Joan Cornish was born about 1452, in Mashbury, Essex, England, her father, John Cornish, was 29 and her mother, Agnes, was 23. She married Thomas Everard Esq. in 1480, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1505, in Kent, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Joan Cornish est née environ 1452, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Cornish, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Everard Esq. en 1480, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1505, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Joan Cornish um 1452 in Mashbury, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cornish 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes 23. Sie hat 1480 in Essex, England Thomas Everard Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1505 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Joan Cornish è nata il circa 1452 nel Mashbury, Essex, England, sua padre, John Cornish, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Everard Esq. nel 1480, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1505, nel Kent, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Joan Cornishが約1452年にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父John Cornishは29歳，母Agnesは23歳であった。1480年にイギリスエセックスでThomas Everard Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年にイギリスケントで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Joan Cornish(이)가 대략 1452년 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cornish(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 에세스에서 Thomas Everard Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 켄트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Joan Cornish nasceu aproximadamente 1452, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cornish, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Everard Esq. em 1480, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1505, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Joan Cornish родилась около 1452 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cornish было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Everard Esq. в 1480 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1505 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Joan Cornish nació aproximadamente 1452, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cornish, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Everard Esq. en 1480, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1505, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
